targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 2) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN source_type = 'direct' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN source_type = 'workunit' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ocr.outcome_id) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))

panels.description: Cost per outcome, stacked by outcome, binned by the Aggregation selector.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ocr.bucket_hour, $agg),
  CONCAT(ocr.outcome_id, ' — ', COALESCE(o.title, ocr.outcome_id)) AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(ocr.cost_usd), 4) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
LEFT JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = ocr.outcome_id
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))
GROUP BY 1, ocr.outcome_id, o.title
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cost by Outcome

panels.description: Cost stacked by source (direct outcome vs each workunit), binned by the Aggregation selector.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(ocr.bucket_hour, $agg),
  CASE
    WHEN ocr.source_type = 'direct' THEN '(direct outcome)'
    ELSE CONCAT(ocr.source_id, ' — ', COALESCE(w.title, ocr.source_id))
  END AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(ocr.cost_usd), 4) AS value
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
LEFT JOIN workunits w ON w.id = ocr.source_id AND ocr.source_type = 'workunit'
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))
GROUP BY 1, ocr.source_type, ocr.source_id, w.title
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cost Decomposition (Direct + WorkUnits)

panels.description: Hierarchical breakdown: each outcome with its constituent workunits and direct cost.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONCAT(ocr.outcome_id, ' — ', COALESCE(o.title, ocr.outcome_id)) AS outcome,
  CASE
    WHEN ocr.source_type = 'direct' THEN '  ↳ (direct)'
    ELSE CONCAT('  ↳ ', ocr.source_id, ' — ', COALESCE(w.title, ocr.source_id))
  END AS source,
  ocr.source_type,
  ROUND(SUM(ocr.cost_usd), 2) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(ocr.tokens)) AS tokens
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
LEFT JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = ocr.outcome_id
LEFT JOIN workunits w ON w.id = ocr.source_id AND ocr.source_type = 'workunit'
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))
GROUP BY ocr.outcome_id, o.title, ocr.source_type, ocr.source_id, w.title
ORDER BY ocr.outcome_id, ocr.source_type DESC, cost_usd DESC

panels.title: Outcome → Source Breakdown

panels.description: Top outcomes by total cost in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONCAT(ocr.outcome_id, ' — ', COALESCE(o.title, ocr.outcome_id)) AS outcome,
  COALESCE(o.status, '') AS status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ocr.source_type = 'workunit' THEN ocr.source_id END) AS workunits,
  ROUND(SUM(ocr.cost_usd), 2) AS total_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ocr.source_type = 'direct' THEN ocr.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) AS direct_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ocr.source_type = 'workunit' THEN ocr.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 2) AS workunit_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ocr.source_type = 'direct' THEN ocr.cost_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(ocr.cost_usd), 0), 4) AS direct_pct
FROM outcome_cost_rollup ocr
LEFT JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = ocr.outcome_id
WHERE ocr.bucket_hour BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (('${filter_value:raw}' = 'All' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '\$__all' OR '${filter_value:raw}' = '') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags ef JOIN tags tf ON tf.id = ef.tag_id WHERE ef.entity_type = 'outcome' AND ef.entity_id = ocr.outcome_id AND tf.tag_key = '${filter_key:raw}' AND tf.tag_value = '${filter_value:raw}'))
GROUP BY ocr.outcome_id, o.title, o.status
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Outcome Summary

list.label: Filter Key
list.name: filter_key
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT t.tag_key FROM tags t JOIN entity_tags et ON et.tag_id = t.id WHERE (t.category = 'context' OR t.tag_key IN ('work-type','phase','priority')) AND t.tag_key NOT LIKE 'git.%' ORDER BY t.tag_key

list.label: Filter Value
list.name: filter_value
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT t.tag_value FROM tags t JOIN entity_tags et ON et.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.tag_key = '${filter_key}' AND t.tag_value != '' ORDER BY t.tag_value
